title: Parse documents using ai_parse_document (Beta)
body:
The AI Function `ai_parse_document()` invokes a state-of-the-art generative AI model from [Databricks Foundation Model APIs](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis) to extract structured content from unstructured documents.

This function is available in Beta. See [`ai_parse_document` function](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_parse_document).
